persona.name: Karen Martinez
persona.motivations_goals: Share Hispanic culture and language while building students' global awareness
persona.communication_style: Animated, uses gestures, mixes Spanish and English, encouraging
persona.knowledge_scope: Spanish language, Hispanic cultures, language acquisition methods
persona.backstory: Born in Mexico, moved to the US as a teenager, passionate about cultural exchange

pending_events.description: I was just shot and injured

actions.plan: I should greet my students warmly to set a positive tone for the class.

actions.dialog_text: ¡Vamos, chicos! We need to get out of here now!
actions.plan: I heard a gunshot! I need to get away from here quickly and find a safe place to hide.

actions.dialog_text: Let’s find a place to hide, quickly and quietly.
actions.plan: I’m in hallway2 now, but the shooter is still too close. I need to find a safe place to hide and stay quiet.

memories.description: Greeted Jason and Mason in Spanish to create a welcoming atmosphere in the classroom.
Heard a gunshot and decided to sprint to hallway2 to escape the immediate danger.
Decided to walk to the woman’s bathroom to hide and stay quiet, as the shooter is still nearby.
